title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Look at all these! There's enough to
decorate your office and the disciplinary
committee room too!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to be surrounded by rivals everywhere I
go! My blood's already pumping!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'm taking these new rivals for a run right
away! And don't think I'm gonna take it easy on
them just 'cause they're cute!
